_note: Linear historically failed as bug #23: Query.initiativeUpdate and Mutation.initiativeUpdate share a field name → same MCP tool name → duplicate_tool_name. Resolved by the naming pass treating the MCP tool name as its own collision surface (the pair disambiguate by root: linear_initiative_update_query vs _mutation). That exact collision is asserted in compiler.test.ts; here we pin a few stable UNIQUE-operationId ops (the plural query fields sit right next to the colliding singular ones) so the whole real schema stays green and correctly classified.
